expected_properties: dout follows each addr change without glitches.
additional_cases.goal: Verify combinational read stability under rapid address toggling.
stimulus_intent: Toggle addr through a sequence of values each cycle.

expected_properties: Repeated identical addr yields identical dout across observations.
additional_cases.goal: Confirm deterministic output for same address.
stimulus_intent: Apply same addr value multiple times separated by idle cycles.

expected_properties: dout updates to reflect mem[addr] after any change in addr.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate that any address change results in correct data output without assuming latency.
notes: Since ROM is combinational, output should follow input changes.
stimulus_intent: Drive addr with a set of arbitrary values and monitor dout.
timing_assumptions: No clock edge required; combinational propagation.

expected_properties: dout reflects correct data for min (0x00) and max (0xFF) address values.
notes: Edge case focuses on address extremes.
